name: cc-use
description: Launch Claude Code with third-party Anthropic-compatible providers (DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, Volcengine, OpenRouter…). Shared native ~/.claude/ context by default; use `cc-use isolate` for per-profile isolated sessions.
author: leechen298

scripts.test: tsx --test test/profile.test.ts test/url.test.ts test/exec.test.ts test/init.test.ts test/doctor.test.ts test/importHistory.test.ts test/cli.test.ts test/wizard.test.ts
scripts.coverage: pnpm build && c8 --all --src src --include "src/**/*.ts" --include "dist/**/*.js" --exclude "test/**/*.ts" --reporter text --reporter lcov tsx --test test/profile.test.ts test/url.test.ts test/exec.test.ts test/init.test.ts test/doctor.test.ts test/importHistory.test.ts test/cli.test.ts test/wizard.test.ts
